content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic rewards from ICM/RND can be integrated into step-wise GRPO to reward policy updates that prioritize high-uncertainty, information-gathering trajectory steps, rather than just rewarding final task success. This creates a self-improving loop where step-wise GRPO explicitly prioritizes exploring unexpected state transitions that generate more intrinsic reward for further curiosity-driven exploration.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
